Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Ви можете вибрати, чи застосувати {f 0 1 2}атаку{f 0 1 27} чи {f 0 1 2}вміння{f 0 1 27} проти ваших ворогів.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can attack with whatever weapon you have currently equipped on you. While it doesn't do the most damage, it will not deplete your HP or SP.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 2}On the other hand, using a skill will deplete your HP or SP. To use one, press {f 1 3 112}, then select the skill you want to use and the target you want to use it on.[n]{f 1 1}
